main.description: Represents the availability of a specific asset on a specific platform.

assetRef.description: Pointer to the Movie or Series.

platformRef.description: e.g., 'did:web:circuitcinema.com' or a specific App AT-URI.

watchUrl.description: Deep link to stream the asset.

allowedTerritories.description: Geographic regions. Supports ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 ('US'), ISO 3166-2 ('US-CA'), or prefixed hyper-local codes ('zip:US:90210', 'dma:501'). If omitted/empty, implies worldwide availability.

excludedTerritories.description: Geographic regions where the offer is explicitly blocked, supporting the same formats as allowedTerritories.

price.description: Optional: Cost in cents (only needed if TVOD/EST).
